testcase.name: test_09_user_phone_create_and_persist

failure.message: AssertionError: phone not persisted: None assert None == '+9647801234567' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf99ad4fe0440>('phone') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf99ad4fe0440> = {'id': '750a7081-fb3a-4b0a-9839-27d0ea3fd227', 'username': 'testcashier_1783351492', 'email': 'TEST_cashier_1783351492@maestroegp.com', 'full_name': 'Test Cashier', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_2fa_master_toggle.py:244: in test_09_user_phone_create_and_persist assert found.get("phone") == "+9647801234567", f"phone not persisted: {found.get('phone')}" E AssertionError: phone not persisted: None E assert None == '+9647801234567' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf99ad4fe0440>('phone') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf99ad4fe0440> = {'id': '750a7081-fb3a-4b0a-9839-27d0ea3fd227', 'username': 'testcashier_1783351492', 'email': 'TEST_cashier_1783351492@maestroegp.com', 'full_name': 'Test Cashier', ...}.get
